scenes.description: Performance of "Kaguya no Shiro de Odoritai" concludes with choreography and light effects.
MC section: The 3rd generation members celebrate Noel's birthday and discuss her new 2 million subscribers commemorative outfit.
Announcement section: Noel announces the 3rd Generation solo live concert at K-Arena Yokohama.
